coach_notes: To build a strong protective-service career, prioritize developing incident reporting, documentation, and security operations, as these are foundational for roles like security officer or loss prevention. Start by taking free online courses in incident reporting and security operations from platforms like Coursera or ALICE Training, and practice writing clear reports in your current role. You already have excellent customer service and access control skills, which are valuable—combine them with these missing skills to become a standout candidate.

jobs.title: Asset Protection Coordinator
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Strong alignment with security procedures, incident response, and emergency response skills. Customer service and awareness are directly applicable to asset protection coordination.
jobs.gaps: No specific mention of coordination or supervisory experience; may need to demonstrate ability to manage multiple tasks or lead teams.

jobs.title: Asset Protection Specialist (Part Time), Henderson (Sunset)
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Part-time role matches hands-on experience in security procedures, incident response, and customer service. Skills in access and store policy are directly relevant.
jobs.gaps: No specific retail or asset protection experience listed; may need to highlight transferable skills from other security roles.

jobs.title: Asset Protection Specialist (Part Time)
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Similar to job 2, part-time asset protection specialist role aligns with security procedures, incident response, and customer service skills. Awareness and emergency response are key.
jobs.gaps: Lack of direct asset protection experience; emphasize hands-on security and customer interaction skills.

jobs.title: Risk Associate - Walnut Street
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Risk associate role may involve security and incident response, leveraging skills in awareness and emergency response. Customer service is a plus.
jobs.gaps: No risk management or analytical skills listed; missing experience with risk assessment, data analysis, or financial loss prevention.

jobs.title: Detention Deputy Pre-Certified
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Detention deputy role requires security awareness and incident response, which are present in resume. Customer service may be useful in inmate interactions.
jobs.gaps: No law enforcement or corrections experience; missing certification, physical fitness requirements, and knowledge of detention procedures. Major gap in pre-certification status.
